mapper.select:
SELECT u.id FROM alert u LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id = u.id_error WHERE u.id_device = #{id_device} AND u.id_error = #{id_error} AND u.status = 1 AND u.is_delete = 0 AND e.is_delete = 0 AND e.status = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT u.id FROM alert_queue u LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id = u.id_error WHERE u.id_device = #{id_device} AND u.id_error = #{id_error} AND u.status = 1 AND u.is_delete = 0 AND e.is_delete = 0 AND e.status = 1 AND u.is_queue = 0
